Office Worker Who Sees Fate

운명을 보는 회사원

Read First
Read the Novel

Office Worker Who Sees Fate

운명을 보는 회사원

5.0
7 ratings

Synopsis

A child born to become a shaman and disrupt the world. He tries to become an ordinary office worker in order not to give up his greed and receive God.Choi Young-hoon, who sees through fate through contemplation and spurs. Can you really become an ordinary office worker?

Genres

DramaSupernatural

  • ryujinvu201910d ago
    5.0
    Amazing art Great dialogue Strong characters Emotional impact Good pacing Great plot

    Best of the best manhwa I ever read in my life. When this manhwa come in English hardcover book I really like full collection of this beautiful manhwa.

  • jachthebear2mo ago
    5.0
    Great dialogue Amazing art Great plot

    At first i didn't though must of this manhwa, but the more i read the more interesting it get, especially when the MC explain the mechanisim of "fortune telling" Overall, the story is fun to read, it not that "great" or "bad/lame" it somewhere in between.
